description: Perfect for those casual outings, these suede and leather  sandals  from red tape are all that you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort. Pair them with your favourite casual pants, shorts or jeans and make a fashion statement!  UpperLeather and suede straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and styleA leather loop on the upper middle holding the straps in placeAnkle strap in leather and suede to lock the foot in placeAll straps have a fabric inner lining and are padded to protect the feet from blistering and to offer breathable comfortVelcro midfoot strap for a customised  FitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionFootbed made of suede in the toe region and in a horse-shoe shape in the ankle region, with the remainder made of suede for absolute breathable comfort and styleFootbed stitched to the midsole for durabilityOutsoleDurable rubber outsole, curved at the midfoot and forefoot to offer absolute ergonomic comfortTextured outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfacesShoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineUse a suede brush to remove dust from the suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
